title: hieracium schmidtii subsp. arcicola
intro: Hieracium schmidtii subsp. arcicola, also known as a type of hawkweed, is a perennial plant species native to certain regions. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Hieracium schmidtii subsp. arcicola include potential uses in treating wounds, skin issues, and reducing fever. Herbal preparations of this plant can be found in the form of infusions, tinctures, and salves, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
